Species-Tiefling — Male Tiefling Fighter: 5
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 10 (+0) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 12 (+1) Charisma: 14 (+2)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Chaotic Good Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma; Intelligence; Wisdom Experience: 6864/14000 Level: 5 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes:
Ability Boosts: 3 to distribute
Tactical Mind: Can add 1d10 to a failed ability check, expending a use of Second Wind if the result is a success
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +3
Feat Count: Fighting Style; General Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighter Primary Ability); Fighter (Fighter Subclass); Tiefling (Fiendish Legacy)
Feats: Alert; Archery Tiefling Features: Abyssal; Chthonic; Darkvision; Fiendish Legacy; Infernal; Otherworldly Presence; Tiefling Spellcasting Ability; Wisdom Fighter Features: Action Surge; Armor Training (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Champion; Dexterity; Extra Attack; Fighter Primary Ability; Fighter Subclass; Fighting Style; Improved Critical; Remarkable Athlete; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion; Perception, Survival); Tactical Mind; Tactical Shift; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Fiendish Legacy: 1 selection
Fighter Primary Ability: 1 selection
Fighter Subclass: 1 selection
Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Darkvision: R60' Sees one light level better
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +3 Insight: (wis) +4 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +4 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +2 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +5
Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) +1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +0
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +2 Stealth: (dex) +0
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +1 Survival: (wis) +1
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Animal Handling; Insight; Perception, Survival; Religion
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Languages: Abyssal; Common; Halfling
Skill Notes:
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Remarkable Athlete: Has advantage on Athletics
Combat
Hit Points: 24 Initiative: +3 Armor Class: 18
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Chain Mail Shield: Shield Weapons: Rapier (+4 1d8+1 P; Vex); Scimitar (+4 1d6+1 S; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+4 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +3 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +5
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Action Surge: Can take an extra non-magic action once per short rest
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Improved Critical: Scores a critical hit on a natural 19
Remarkable Athlete: Has advantage on initiative and can move 15' after scoring a critical hit without provoking opportunity attacks
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+5 hit points 3 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest
Tactical Shift: Using Second Wind allows moving 15' without provoking opportunity attacks
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 4 chosen kinds of simple or martial melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +2; Constitution: +4; Dexterity: +0; Intelligence: +2; Strength: +4; Wisdom: +1
Save Notes:
Abyssal: Has resistance to poison
Chthonic: Has resistance to necrotic
Infernal: Has resistance to fire
Magic
Attack: C: +4; Tiefling: +4 Spell DC: C: 12; Tiefling: 12
Spells:
Chill Touch (Chthonic0 [Chthonic] Necr): Touch inflicts 2d10 HP necrotic and target cannot regain hit points until the end of the next turn
Darkness (Infernal2 [Infernal] Evoc): R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
False Life (Chthonic1 [Chthonic] Necr): Self gains 2d4+4 temporary hit points [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
Fire Bolt (Infernal0 [Infernal] Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 2d10 HP fire or ignites an unattended flammable target
Hellish Rebuke (Infernal1 [Infernal] Evoc): R60' Cast as a reaction, inflicts 2d10 HP fire on a successful attacker (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Hold Person (Abyssal2 [Abyssal] Ench): R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Poison Spray (Abyssal0 [Abyssal] Necr): R30' Ranged spell inflicts 2d12 HP poison
Ray Of Enfeeblement (Chthonic2 [Chthonic] Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d8 damage with Strength weapons (save Constitution disadvantage on the first attack before the start of the next turn only; additional saves each rd ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Ray Of Sickness (Abyssal1 [Abyssal] Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Thaumaturgy (Otherworldly Presence0 [Otherworldly Presence] Tran): R30' Creates a minor magic effect: a booming voice for 1 min; a modification of flames for 1 min; harmless ground tremors for 1 min; an illusory sound; movement of a door or window; a change in eye appearance for 1 min
Magic Notes:
Abyssal: Knows the Poison Spray cantrip and can cast Ray Of Sickness and Hold Person once per long rest
Chthonic: Knows the Chill Touch cantrip and can cast False Life and Ray Of Enfeeblement once per long rest
Infernal: Knows the Fire Bolt cantrip and can cast Hellish Rebuke and Darkness once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Otherworldly Presence: Knows the Thaumaturgy cantrip
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 3 available vs. 6 allocated
